vanilla.description: Default Windrose values — all multipliers at 1.0.

easy.description: Friendlier pace — more loot / XP, cheaper crafting, bigger stacks.

hard.description: Grindy / punishing — scarcer loot, heavier carry, costlier crafting.

event-2xxp.description: Weekend event: double XP. Other multipliers unchanged.

event-loot.description: Weekend event: double loot. Other multipliers unchanged.

event-chill.description: Relaxed build mode — half craft cost and weight, double stacks and cooking.
